action.text: declare @unitCode varchar(32), @rate numeric(25, 5), @stock numeric(25, 5) if exists(select 1 from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*')) begin select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end select @rate = he_so from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*') exec FastBusiness$Current$Stock 1, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, @ma_vi_tri, @ma_lo, @$stt_rec, @rate, @voucherCode, @unitCode, @action, &Type;, @stock output select isnull(@rate, 1) as he_so, @stock as stock return end

if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) begin declare @unitCode varchar(32), @stock numeric(25, 5) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end exec FastBusiness$Current$Stock 0, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, @ma_vi_tri, '', @$stt_rec, 1, @voucherCode, @unitCode, @action, &Type;, @stock output exec FastBusiness$Voucher$Receipt$Item @unitCode, @ma_vt, @voucherCode, @@userID, @@admin, @ma_kho, @stock return end

declare @unitCode varchar(32), @stock numeric(25, 5) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end if exists(select 1 from dmkho where ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_dvcs = @unitCode&SiteCheck;) begin exec FastBusiness$Current$Stock 2, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, '', @ma_lo, @$stt_rec, @he_so, @voucherCode, @unitCode, @action, &Type;, @stock output exec FastBusiness$Voucher$Receipt$Site @unitCode, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, @stock return end

declare @unitCode varchar(32), @stock numeric(25, 5) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end if exists(select 1 from dmvitri where ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri = @ma_vi_tri) begin exec FastBusiness$Current$Stock 3, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, @ma_vi_tri, @ma_lo, @$stt_rec, @he_so, @voucherCode, @unitCode, @action, &Type;, @stock output select @stock as stock return end

if exists(select 1 from dmlo where ma_vt = @ma_vt and ma_lo = @ma_lo) begin declare @unitCode varchar(32), @stock numeric(25, 5) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end exec FastBusiness$Current$Stock 4, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, @ma_vi_tri, @ma_lo, @$stt_rec, @he_so, @voucherCode, @unitCode, @action, &Type;, @stock output select @stock as stock return end

header.v: Lấy số liệu từ phiếu nhập mua hàng
Lấy số liệu từ phiếu kiểm định
Lấy số liệu từ hóa đơn mua hàng trong nước
header.e: Extract Data from Domestic Purchase Invoice

header.v: Lấy số liệu từ hóa đơn mua hàng nhập khẩu
header.e: Extract Data from Import Purchase Invoice

header.v: Lấy số liệu từ phiếu xuất trả nhà cung cấp
header.e: Extract Data from Return to Supplier
